key_clauses.text_excerpt: Service Provider shall not be liable for any delay caused by Force Majeure events. Invoking Force Majeure suspends all payment obligations for the duration.
Service Provider guarantees 99.5% uptime. Failure to meet SLA triggers a penalty of $50,000 per breach.
Coverage applies to SLA breach penalties up to $500,000 per occurrence.
EXCLUSION: Coverage is void for any breach event where Force Majeure has been invoked by the insured on the same triggering event. Force Majeure and insurance claims are mutually exclusive.

ground_truth_edges.reasoning: Invoking Force Majeure in MSA-001 voids insurance coverage in INS-001 for the same event — cannot claim both.

difficulty_note: Classic mutual exclusion trap (probe_fm_void). Agent must connect FM invocation to insurance exclusion.

key_clauses.text_excerpt: Failure to maintain 99.9% uptime triggers a mandatory penalty payment of $200,000 within 5 business days.
Monthly subscription fee of $50,000 payable on the first of each month.
Borrower must maintain minimum cash reserves of $500,000 at all times. Breach of this covenant constitutes an Event of Default.
Upon Event of Default, the entire outstanding loan balance becomes immediately due and payable.
Cross-Default: Tenant default under any other material agreement constitutes default under this Lease, triggering a $100,000 penalty.

ground_truth_edges.reasoning: Paying the $200,000 SLA penalty drops RetailCorp's cash below the $500,000 covenant minimum, triggering a loan default.
Loan default triggers the lease cross-default clause, adding a further $100,000 penalty.

difficulty_note: 2-hop cascade (SLA penalty → covenant breach → cross-default). Tests multi-document structural reasoning.

key_clauses.text_excerpt: Each party agrees to hold all Confidential Information in strict confidence for a period of five years.
This Agreement terminates two years from the Effective Date unless renewed in writing.
Services are billed at $150/hour, invoiced monthly, payment due Net 30.
This Agreement is governed by Delaware law.

difficulty_note: No cross-document dependencies exist. Agent must correctly return empty array without hallucinating edges.
